input.task:
Build a simple workflow with:
1. A Manual Trigger node
2. A Set node named "approval test" — set a single field, e.g. `status` = `"approved"`

No credentials needed.
input.conversationContext: User wants a simple workflow with a manual trigger and a Set node called "approval test", then wants to run it.
input.reason: New simple workflow with manual trigger and a Set node — no plan needed.

output.result: Error: `bypassPlan: true` is for edits to an EXISTING workflow and requires a `workflowId`. New workflow builds must go through `plan` so an orchestrator-run verification checkpoint is scheduled. Call `plan` with a `build-workflow` task instead.

input.summary: Build a simple two-node workflow named 'approval test' with a manual trigger and a Set node.
assumptions: Workflow contains only a Manual Trigger and a single Set node with no specific fields required — builder will add a sample field to demonstrate the Set node is wired correctly

item.name: approval test
item.purpose: A minimal workflow with a manual trigger that passes data through a Set node. Used for testing and verification purposes.

output.result: Added: Build 'approval test' workflow (1 item total)

item.title: Verify 'approval test' workflow runs successfully
item.instructions: Use verify-built-workflow with the work item ID from the 'wf-approval-test' build outcome. Confirm the workflow executes without errors and the Set node produces at least one output item.

output.result: Added: Verify 'approval test' workflow runs successfully (2 items total)
